name: oracledb
description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data within Gemini CLI.

settings.name: User
settings.description: Required. Username for the Oracle connection.

settings.name: Password
settings.description: Required. Password for the Oracle connection.

settings.name: Host
settings.description: For Host/Port/Service connection. Use with Port and Service name. Mutually exclusive with TNS Alias and Connection String methods.

settings.name: Port
settings.description: For Host/Port/Service connection. Use with Host and Service name. Mutually exclusive with TNS Alias and Connection String methods.

settings.name: Service Name
settings.description: For Host/Port/Service connection. Use with Host and Port. Mutually exclusive with TNS Alias and Connection String methods.

settings.name: TNS Alias
settings.description: For TNS connection. Use with TNS Admin. Mutually exclusive with Host/Port/Service and Connection String methods.

settings.name: TNS Admin
settings.description: For TNS connection. Path to TNS directory. Use with TNS Alias. Mutually exclusive with Host/Port/Service and Connection String methods.

settings.name: Connection String
settings.description: For Direct Connection String. Mutually exclusive with Host/Port/Service and TNS Alias methods.

settings.name: Wallet Location
settings.description: Optional. Path to Wallet directory. May be required for secure connections.

settings.name: Use OCI
settings.description: Optional. Set to 'true' to use the OCI (thick client) driver, which is required for some connection types like Wallet authentication.
